idea-plugin.name: Eliot
idea-plugin.description:
Support for the Eliot programming language (.els):
  • Syntax highlighting via a bundled TextMate grammar.
  • Diagnostics (errors/warnings) provided by the Eliot language server, run through LSP4IJ.
The language server is bundled with the plugin; no separate installation or build file is needed — the open project folder is the workspace, and the Eliot standard library travels inside the plugin.

server.name: Eliot Language Server
server.description: Eliot language server — whole-workspace diagnostics for .els files.
